templates.name: Swiss-type Cutoff Skeleton
templates.description: Turnter block for cutoff operations on Swiss machines.
templates.content:
(CUTOFF TurnT)
M3 S4000
G1 X0. F0.03
M5

templates.name: Turn Program Head Example
templates.description: Original Turnter header skeleton for Turn TURN-style Fanuc Swiss programs. Verify machine options before running.
templates.content:
O2000 ( SETUP EXAMPLE)
(PROGRAM: PART NAME)
(MATERIAL: ENTER MATERIAL)
G40 G80 G99
G18
G50 S6000
T0101
M3 S3500
M8

templates.name: G83 Peck Drill Example
templates.description: Generic G83 peck drilling skeleton for Turn programming. Adjust R, Q, feed, and depth for the setup.
templates.content:
(G83 PECK DRILL EXAMPLE)
T0303
G0 X(Turnt position) Z(clearance)
M3 S(spindle speed)
M8
G83 Z(hole depth) R(retract plane) Q(peck depth) F(feed)
G80
G0 Z(safe return)

templates.name: G84 Tap Example
templates.description: Generic G84 tapping skeleton. Confirm rigid tapping, spindle direction, pitch, and feed mode on the machine.
templates.content:
(G84 TAP EXAMPLE)
T0404
G0 X(Turnt position) Z(clearance)
M3 S(spindle speed)
M8
G84 X(end diameter) Z(thread depth) R(retract plane) F(pitch or feed)
G80
G0 Z(safe return)

templates.name: G76 Thread Example
templates.description: Two-block G76 threading skeleton for Fanuc-style lathe threading. Values are placeholders.
templates.content:
(G76 THREAD EXAMPLE)
T0505
G0 X(Turnt diameter) Z(clearance)
M3 S(spindle speed)
G76 P(finish passes / chamfer / angle) Q(minimum depth) R(finish allowance)
G76 X(end diameter) Z(thread end) P(thread height) Q(first cut depth) F(thread pitch)
G0 X(safe X) Z(safe Z)

templates.name: G92 Thread Example
templates.description: G92 threading-pass skeleton for simple thread setup examples. Add/remove passes to match the tool and material.
templates.content:
(G92 THREAD EXAMPLE)
T0505
G0 X(Turnt diameter) Z(clearance)
M3 S(spindle speed)
G92 X(first pass diameter) Z(thread end) F(thread pitch)
X(next pass diameter)
X(next pass diameter)
X(finish diameter)
G0 X(safe X) Z(safe Z)

templates.name: G36 Example
templates.description: Placeholder skeleton for G36-related setup on TURN-style controls. Confirm exact function and parameters on the target machine.
templates.content:
(G36 EXAMPLE - VERIFY MACHINE OPTION)
T0606
G0 X(Turnt position) Z(clearance)
G36
G1 Z(target position) F(feed)
G0 X(safe X) Z(safe Z)
G35

templates.name: Cutoff Example
templates.description: Original cutoff operation skeleton for TURN-style Swiss lathe workflows. Adjust spindle, feed, and approach clearance.

templates.name: Multi-Channel PA Example
templates.description: Original three-channel PA Turnter skeleton. Apply Multi-Channel replaces channels 1, 2, and 3 with the matching channel blocks.
templates.content:
%
&F=/O2100(Turn_TURN_MULTI_EXAMPLE)/
<O2100.P1>
O2100
(CH1 MAIN SPINDLE EXAMPLE)
G40 G80 G99
G50 S6000
T0101
M3 S3500
G0 X20. Z2.
G1 Z-10. F0.08
M5
M30

<O2100.P2>
O2100
(CH2 SUB SPINDLE / CUTOFF EXAMPLE)
G40 G80 G99
T0808
M3 S3000
G0 X22. Z-20.
G1 X0. F0.03
M5
M30

<O2100.P3>
O2100
(CH3 AUXILIARY EXAMPLE)
G40 G80
M8
G4 U0.5
M9
M30
%

multiChannelContent.1:
O2100
(CH1 MAIN SPINDLE EXAMPLE)
G40 G80 G99
G50 S6000
T0101
M3 S3500
G0 X20. Z2.
G1 Z-10. F0.08
M5
M30
multiChannelContent.2:
O2100
(CH2 SUB SPINDLE / CUTOFF EXAMPLE)
G40 G80 G99
T0808
M3 S3000
G0 X22. Z-20.
G1 X0. F0.03
M5
M30
multiChannelContent.3:
O2100
(CH3 AUXILIARY EXAMPLE)
G40 G80
M8
G4 U0.5
M9
M30
